base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pickup_items_atlas — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1987 mega man. Pickups — Small/Large Energy capsule (E-tank precursor), Weapon Energy capsule, Extra Life (1UP), Score Ball, Magnet Beam (hidden weapon). 245×118 canvas. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pickups — Small/Large Energy capsule (E-tank precursor), Weapon Energy capsule, Extra Life (1UP), Score Ball, Magnet Beam (hidden weapon). 245×118 canvas
